text: The robotic system's right hand manipulates scissors capable of performing monopolar cutting and coagulation.
The robotic system's left arm is equipped with a grasper designed for bipolar cautery, visible in the surgical field.
The robotic arm grasps the center of a barbell-like object, applying bipolar coagulation to the targeted area.
The interface on the screen visually highlights the change from the left arm to the right arm, indicating the surgeon's right foot is now hovering over the right arm foot pedals.
